rule CDB_AI_Agent_Uncovers_21_ZeroDays_in_FFmpeg_ {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for AI Agent Uncovers 21 Zero-Days in FFmpeg; Chrome Patches Record 429 Bugs"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-06-06"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-INGEST" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}
